When your health is below ##$multiperk2## you will be immune to health damage for ##$multiperk3## seconds.

This cannot occur more than once every ##$multiperk4## seconds.
menu_deck5_1_desc:
Instead of fully regenerating armor when out of combat, the hitman will continuously regenerate armor throughout combat. Heavier armor regenerates more armor, but with longer intervals.

##$multiperk## of your health is converted into ##$multiperk2## armor.

A sound cue plays when this ability triggers.
menu_deck5_5_desc: ##$multiperk## of your health is converted to ##$multiperk2## armor.

When your armor gets depleted it will completely regenerate after ##$multiperk## seconds. This cannot occur more often than once every ##$multiperk2## seconds.

Dealing damage will grant you ##$multiperk3## armor. This can only occur once every ##$multiperk4## seconds.

Deck Completion Bonus: Your chance of getting a higher quality item during a Payday is increased by ##10%##.

You bag corpses ##$multiperk2## faster.

You gain ##$multiperk3## concealment to your armor.

You gain ##$multiperk## more health.

You gain ##$multiperk2## more armor.
menu_deck8_3_desc:
You gain ##$multiperk## more health.

Your melee damage timer is extended by an additional ##$multiperk2## seconds.
menu_deck10_1_desc:
You gain the Pot ability.

The Pot has a maximum limit of ##$multiperk## and can be filled with kills and ammo pickups.

Once filled, you will heal ##$multiperk2## of your health.

When the pot is filled, a sound cue will play.
menu_deck10_3_desc: When the Pot is filled, you will replenish ##$multiperk## of your ammo and your teammates will replenish ##$multiperk2##.
menu_deck10_9_desc:
Killing an enemy at medium range has a ##$multiperk## chance to spread panic among your enemies.

Panic will make enemies go into short bursts of uncontrollable fear.

This cannot occur more than once every ##$multiperk2## second.

Deck Completion Bonus: Your chance of getting a higher quality item during a Payday is increased by ##10%##.
menu_deck12_1_desc:
The lower your health, the higher your armor recovery rate. When your health is below ##$multiperk##, you armor recovery rate will increase up to ##$multiperk2##.

All berserker state effects in this perk deck will start at ##$multiperk3## instead of ##$multiperk4##.
menu_deck12_7_desc:
The lower your health, the more armor recovery rate you have. When your health is below ##$multiperk## you will gain up to an additional ##$multiperk2## armor recovery rate.

Weapon swap speed is increased by ##$multiperk3##.
menu_deck12_9_desc:
Your health is automatically set to ##$multiperk## if the frenzy skill is equipped, allowing you to get the full benefit of this deck's abilities.

Deck Completion Bonus: Your chance of getting a higher quality item during a Payday is increased by ##10%##.
menu_deck13_9_desc:
Killing an enemy speeds up your armor recovery time depending on how much armor you have. The more armor, the less recovery speed gained per kill.
Armor recovery speed is reset whenever your armor recovers.

Your chance to dodge is increased by ##10%##.

Deck Completion Bonus: Your chance of getting a higher quality item during a Payday is increased by ##10%##.

You can now regenerate throwables by picking up ammo boxes. This ability does not stack with fully loaded aced.

When your armor drops, you regenerate more health.

When your health drops, you regenerate more armor.

The Leech Ampule duration is increased to ##$multiperk## seconds.

Killing an enemy reduces the cooldown of the Leech Ampule by ##$multiperk2## second(s).

Taking damage now heals teammates by ##$multiperk3## of their health.

menu_rifleman_beta_desc:
BASIC: ##$basic##
Your snap to zoom is ##$multibasic## with all weapons.

Your movement speed is unhindered while using steel sight.

ACE: ##$pro##
Your weapon zoom level is increased by ##$multipro## with all weapons. Your weapon accuracy while moving is increased by ##$multipro2##.
menu_trigger_happy_beta_desc:
BASIC: ##$basic##
For every hit with a pistol you gain a ##$multibasic## damage boost that lasts for ##$multibasic2## seconds. Stacks up to ##$multibasic3## times.

ACE: ##$pro##
Increases the damage boost duration to ##$multipro## seconds.

You can now hip-fire with your Pistols while sprinting.

Your pistols can now pierce through enemies and enemy body armor.
menu_juggernaut_beta_desc:
BASIC: ##$basic##
Your total armor value is increased by ##$multibasic##.

Movement speed penalties no longer apply.

ACE: ##$pro##
Unlocks the ability to wear the Improved Combined Tactical Vest.
bm_w_colt_1911_desc: Penetrates body armor, enemies, shields and walls.
bm_w_breech_desc: Penetrates body armor, enemies, shields and walls.
bm_w_peacemaker_desc: Penetrates body armor, enemies, shields and walls.
bm_w_x_1911_desc: Penetrates body armor, enemies, shields and walls.
bm_w_x_breech_desc: Penetrates body armor, enemies, shields and walls.
menu_st_spec_1_desc:
The Crew Chief, also known as the Caporegime, is the head of a branch of an organized crime syndicate. The Crew Chief commands a crew of soldiers and reports directly to a boss or an underboss.

Crew Chief is a support deck that provides a bunch of bonuses by existing in a team, which only gets stronger if you take a few hostages while you are at it. Decks with more extreme bonuses get bigger benefits from Crew Chief's existence.
menu_deck2_3_short: You gain ##$multiperk## more health. When your health is below ##$multiperk2## you will be immune to health damage for ##$multiperk3## seconds. This cannot occur more than once every ##$multiperk4## seconds.
menu_st_spec_2_desc:
The Muscle is a tough guy who uses violence to send messages from his Mafia superiors. As the backbone of any criminal organization, the Muscle is called in whenever one needs to rough someone up, break some legs or crush a skull.

Muscle is a health tank deck with minor health regen and it promotes a simple yet effective playstyle.
menu_st_spec_3_desc:
The Armorer is a profession within the military. The armorer's job is to maintain, repair and improve armors.$NL;$NL;The skills of an Armorer trickles down to self-respecting crime syndicates that need someone who can make sure the soldiers have the necessary protection to do their jobs.

Armorer is an armor tank deck that offers a simple yet consistent playstyle.
menu_st_spec_4_desc:
The Rogue is a slippery criminal, capable of sneaky tricks and deadly force. Versatile and deceptive, the Rogue is hired to do anything from pickpocketing, to burglaries and armed robberies.

The Rogue is a dodge deck. Dodge is a mechanic that negates damage taken all-together. Higher your dodge chance, more damage gets negated over the course of a heist. Dodge is a force multiplier to one's abilities, the more you know about the heisting life, the more bullshit you can get away with.
menu_st_spec_5_desc:
The Hitman is a professional killer from the criminal underworld. Criminal syndicates will hire a hitman as a last resort to enforce criminal authority, deliver retribution or eliminate competition.

The Hitman is an armor tank/gate hybrid deck that has a higher preference for gating. While it can suffer from inconsistency, it makes up for it in build variety
menu_deck5_1_short: Instead of fully regenerating armor when out of combat, the hitman will continuously regenerate armor throughout combat. Heavier armor regenerates more armor, but with longer intervals.##$multiperk## of your health is converted into ##$multiperk2## armor.
menu_deck5_3_short: Getting ##$multiperk## kills grants ##$multiperk2## seconds of infinite ammo. A sound cue plays when this ability triggers.
menu_deck5_5_short: ##$multiperk## of your health is converted to ##$multiperk2## armor.
menu_deck5_7_short: ##$multiperk## of your health is converted into ##$multiperk2## armor.
menu_deck5_9_short: When your armor gets depleted it will completely regenerate after ##$multiperk## seconds. This cannot occur more often than once every ##$multiperk2## seconds. Dealing damage will grant you ##$multiperk3## armor. This can only occur once every ##$multiperk4## seconds.
menu_st_spec_6_desc:
The Crook is a low level criminal that steals, lies, cheats and does any and every dishonest or illegal work necessary to get by.

The Crook is a dodge/armor tank hybrid deck that utilizes ballistic vests. While point cost for its exploits are high, its strength comes from the deviation in the dodge playstyle and the variety it can offer compared to other dodge decks.
menu_deck6_9_short: Your armor recover rate is increased by ##$multiperk##. Your armor is increased by ##$multiperk2## for ballistic vests.
menu_st_spec_7_desc:
The Burglar is a criminal that specializes in breaking into places and staying out of trouble. While most Burglars don't go beyond breaking into the houses of grandmas, experienced heist crews always appreciate having a good one around.

The Burglar is a dodge deck with additional benefits for stealth and targeting priority. The benefits on offer work for loud and stealth. However, taking advantage of targeting bonuses requires finesse.
menu_deck7_3_short: Standing still and crouching decreases your chances to be targeted by ##$multiperk##.You bag corpses ##$multiperk2## faster.You gain ##$multiperk3## concealment to your armor.
menu_st_spec_8_desc:
The Infiltrator is an agent hired by a government or large criminal organization to obtain information about its enemies, or by a corporation to obtain industrial secrets from its competitors.

The Infiltrator is a health tank deck with quick health regen benefits packed in. Infiltrator works better at close range and has bonus damage on its melee for quick kills against tanky targets
menu_deck8_5_short: You gain ##$multiperk## more health. You gain ##$multiperk2## more armor.
menu_deck8_3_short: You gain ##$multiperk## more health.Your melee damage timer is extended by an additional ##$multiperk2## seconds.
menu_st_spec_9_desc:
Sociopaths are criminals that are used as hired muscle by larger organizations. Lacking the basics of what it means to be a human, Sociopaths gives off an uneasy feeling to people nearby.

The Sociopath is an armor tank/gate hybrid with a higher preference for tanking. Packed with all sorts of abilities which only really kicks in during close range combat compared to more consistent armor decks.
menu_deck9_1_short: When surrounded by three enemies or more, receive ##12%## less damage. Consecutive melee hits deal ##10## times damage as long as it is within ##1## second.
menu_deck9_5_short: Killing an enemy with a melee weapon regenerates ##10%## health. ##8%## damage reduction if close to an enemy.
menu_st_spec_10_desc:
Gamblers are not exactly criminals, but one that goes deep enough often finds themselves tangled in crime. Gamblers always chase that high that comes from taking risks and should the risk pays off, they go deeper and deeper, forever chasing a high that is statistically unlikely to happen.

The Gambler is a support deck that improves the ammo economy of the team and gives healing to the other heisters on the job.
menu_deck10_1_short: You gain the Pot ability.The Pot is filled filled with kills and ammo pickups and the limit is ##$20##.Once filled, you will heal ##$multiperk2## of your health.When the pot is filled, a sound cue will play.
menu_deck10_3_short: When the Pot is filled, you will replenish ##$multiperk## of your ammo and your teammates will replenish ##$multiperk2##.
menu_deck10_9_short: Killing an enemy at medium range has a ##$multiperk## chance to spread panic among your enemies.Panic will make enemies go into short bursts of uncontrollable fear and it cannot occur more than once every ##$multiperk2## second.
menu_st_spec_11_desc:
Grinder is a type of hockey player that is known for their aggressive and relentless plays so it is not a big surprise that the traits they have translate well into the heisting life.

The Grinder is a health sustain deck that can heal back all their health in a manner of seconds assuming they can constantly deal damage. This deck limits the armor choices to suit or light ballistic vest in order to function.
menu_st_spec_12_desc:
Yakuza is a criminal organization that prefers intimidation tactics and subterfuge over intense violence. Due to the pyramid scheme structure they have, Yakuza become unpopular amongst young crooks, leaving a bunch of old men who are way past their prime to carry the torch.

The Yakuza is a deck that exists. The movement speed bonus is useful in stealth and you can treat it as a challenge deck in loud. This is as close as you can get to having no perk deck, allowing you to stress test the game's skill tree system.
menu_deck12_7_short: Same as above, also random amount of faster weapon swap speed cause why the fuck not.
menu_deck12_9_short: Your health is automatically set to ##$multiperk## if the frenzy skill is equipped, allowing you to get the full benefit of this deck's abilities.
menu_st_spec_13_desc:
The Ex-Presidents are one of the most daring heisting crews out there. An Ex-President follows no rules and only adheres to the Ozaki 8, a set of trials to honor nature.

The Ex-President is a dodge/health sustain hybrid deck. Extra dodge provides much needed safety net to one's extra health, allowing one to tank shots and recover with relative ease.
menu_deck13_9_short: Killing an enemy speeds up your armor recovery time depending on how much armor you have. The more armor, the less recovery speed gained per kill. Armor recovery speed is reset whenever your armor recovers.Your chance to dodge is increased by ##$10%##.
menu_st_spec_14_desc:
The Maniac is the embodiment of crazy and to never accept bad odds in moments of danger. By pushing through and constantly deal damage, the heisters become much harder to kill.

The Maniac is a support deck that provides damage absorption to the entire team. Damage absorption cuts down the damage received by a flat amount and damage absorption is calculated after damage resistance.
menu_st_spec_15_desc:
An Anarchist is someone who refuses to acknowledge the arbitrary laws imposed by traditional authority. The refusal to abide by established truths enables the Anarchist's to pack light while skirmishing in the front lines.

The Anarchist is an armor gating deck, which has multiple ways to regen armor to negate damage. Armor gating cuts the excess damage if the armor depletes from a shot, allowing one to get away with their health untouched. Nearly every deck can do this but Anarchist excels at it.
menu_st_spec_16_desc:
Bikers are a type of gang that ride bikes and act like outlaws as if they live in 1880's. They usually get hired to act as muscles for larger organizations. When not paid to fuck shit up for others, biker gangs deal in narcotics and run protection rackets.

The Biker is a health tank/sustain hybrid deck with a smidge of armor gating benefits. Combined with endless throwables, Biker is quite hard to remove from defensive positions.
menu_deck16_3_short: You gain ##10%## more health.You can now regenerate throwables by picking up ammo boxes. This ability does not stack with fully loaded aced.
menu_deck16_5_short: You gain ##10%## more health.When your armor drops, you regenerate more health.
menu_deck16_7_short: You gain ##20%## more health.When your health drops, you regenerate more armor.
menu_deck16_9_short: The cooldown to kill regen is reduced by ##$multiperk## second.You gain ##40%## more health.
menu_st_spec_17_desc:
Kingpin is a name given to drug lords. They are ruthless, unhinged, violent and most of them have a habit of consuming their own products, which amplifies their already unstable nature.

The Kingpin is a health tank deck in a league on its own. The injector it comes with heals the damage taken, allowing feats of unparalleled ultra-violence.
menu_st_spec_18_desc:
The Sicario is a name given to the dedicated hitmans of a Cartel. Sicarios specializes in 'getting the job done'.

The Sicario is a dodge deck that comes with a smoke bomb which can be used for clearing space with relative safety, pushing for objectives, crossing sightlines and rescuing teammates. You only get one smoke bomb at any given time and it has a long cooldown, so use it wisely.
menu_st_spec_19_desc:
Being a Stoic, doesn't mean the person in question is a criminal, but the ability to keep a cool head in the stress inducing profession such as being a heister comes with life-saving benefits.

The Stoic is a health tank deck that relies heavily on outside sources of sustain. But if one has that alongside knowing when to take a sip, Stoic becomes an unmoveable object that can tank basically any damage. Promotes an easygoing gameplay rhythm that is easy to master.
menu_deck20_1_short: Unlocks and equipds the gas dispenser
menu_st_spec_20_desc:
Tag Team isn't a term used specifically in the criminal world, but rather an affectionate term for a duo that always has each other's backs.

The Tag Team is a deck that provides health regen to the user and their chosen partner in crime. One can tag their fellow heisters, crew AI or jokers to start the effects of the deck. The better the duo is at killing, the longer lasting the healing gets.
menu_st_spec_21_desc:
A white-collar Hacker's job is to stress test the digital systems used all around the world. But not every Hacker is a little goody two shoes and some don't mind exploiting poorly made systems to their selfish benefits, whether it is for subterfuge or armed robberies.

The Hacker is a dodge deck that comes with a pocket ECM. The pocket ECM can be used as a panic button, a source of healing and extra dodge, often all three at the same time. If the user is good at killing to cut down the cooldown of the pocket ECM, the bullshit one can get away with surpasses the capabilities of any deck. Pocket ECM also works in stealth to disable cameras and delay pagers for a short while.
menu_deck21_3_short: Your chance to dodge is increased by ##$multiperk##.
menu_deck21_9_short: Your chance to dodge is increased by ##$multiperk##.
menu_st_spec_22_desc:
Triad is a criminal organization of oriental nature. Unlike other criminal organizations that originate from the east such as Yakuza, Triads are more prone to violent activities. The gang picked up few tricks from them during their skirmish with the Golden Dagger Triad.

The Triad is a health/gate/sustain deck that is weak when outside the Ampule effect, but effectively unkillable during it. Damage taken during the Leech ampule effect will quickly heal off any damage taken by the rest of the crew.
menu_deck22_1_desc:
Unlocks and equips the Leech Ampule.

Changing to another perk deck will make the Leech Ampule unavailable again. The Leech Ampule replaces your current throwable, is equipped in your throwable slot and can be switched out if desired.

While in game you can use throwable key ##$multiperk##. to activate the Leech Ampule.

Activating the Leech Ampule will restore ##40%## health and disables your armor for the duration of the Leech Ampule.

While the Leech Ampule is active your health is divided into segments of ##$20%## and damage taken from enemies removes one segment. Killing ##$2## enemies will restore one segment of your health and block damage for 1 second. Any time you take damage your teammates are healed for ##5%## of their health.

The Leech Ampule lasts ##$6## seconds with a ##30## second cooldown.
menu_deck22_1_short: Unlocks and equips the Leech Ampule.
menu_deck22_3_short: While the Leech Ampule is active, you cannot go into bleedout, but being out of health will slow you down by ##$multiperk##.
menu_deck22_5_short: The Leech Ampule duration is increased to ##$multiperk## seconds.Killing an enemy reduces the cooldown of the Leech Ampule by ##$multiperk2## second(s).Taking damage now heals teammates by ##$multiperk3## of their health.
menu_deck22_9_short: While the Leech Ampule is active, your health is now divided into segments of ##$multiperk##.
menu_st_spec_23_desc:
A Con Artist is a manipulative organism that can appear as a human. They lie, cheat and deceive their way to their own selfish goals. They are usually into scamming others, preferring tricks to get what they want.

The Con Artist is a deck that allows you to have some influence on how it functions and can be built for a variety of situations. The deck itself can mimic a card from other decks so combined with its unique effects, you get a pretty good deal out of it. Not recommended for beginners.
